overview: Harpy is a Normal-class Beast monster found in Ruins. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): 100 HP, 21 physical damage, 150 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 3, MaxImpactEndurance 3. 3 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Flying at 140% ratio (294 base damage). Nightmare gains 2 exclusive abilityies: Flying L, Flying R.

phases.name: Combat
phases.description: 3 attacks. Primary: Flying (140%), Ground Kick (140%), Ground Feather (60%).

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

strategies.title: Nightmare Gains: Flying L, Flying R
strategies.description: Nightmare grade has 2 exclusive abilities not present in lower grades: Flying L, Flying R. These change the fight dynamics in Nightmare.

elite_differences: Nightmare gains 2 exclusive abilities: Flying L, Flying R

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
